[[af:Vuurrot (astrologie)]][[cdo:Bīng-cṳ̄]][[de:Feuer-Ratte]][[fr:Rat de feu]][[hak:Piáng-chṳ́]][[ja:丙子]][[ko:병자]][[nds:Füür-Rött]][[vi:Bính Tý]][[za:Bingjceij]][[zh-min-nan:Péng-chú]][[zh-yue:丙子]][[zh:丙子]]

'''Yang Fire Rat also known as 丙子''' (hinoene (丙子), heikanonezumi (丙子), heikanone (丙子), heishi (丙子)) is one of the elements of the [[Sexagenary cycle]].

It is the 13th combination of the [[Sexagenary cycle]], preceded by [[Yin Wood Pig]] and followed by [[Yin Fire Ox]]. In [[Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|Yin Yang Five Elements]], the heavenly stem [[Hinoe (丙)]] represents yang [[Fire (wuxing)|Fire (火)]], while the earthly branch [[Rat (zodiac)|Rat]] represents yang water, establishing a restraining relationship ([[Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)|Mutual Restraint]], i.e. water overcomes fire).

==Pronunciation==
* English: Yang Fire Rat (丙子)
** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): bǐngzǐ
** Cantonese (Jyutping): bing3 zi2
** Japanese:
***Kunyomi 1: Hinoe-ne
***Kunyomi 2: Heika-no-ne
***Onyomi 1: heishi
** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): byeongja (병자)
** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Bính Tý

==Years of Yang Fire Rat==
A year in the [[Common Era]] that leaves a remainder of 16 when divided by 60 is a Besshi [[Year|year]].
{| class="wikitable"
|+'''Years of Besshi (丙子の年)'''
|-
! [[1st millennium|1st Millennium]]
!! [[2nd millennium|2nd Millennium]]
!! [[3rd millennium|3rd Millennium]]
|-
|
* [[AD 16|16 AD]]
* [[AD 76|76 AD]]
* [[AD 136|136 AD]]
* [[196|196 AD]]
* [[256|256 AD]]
* [[316|316 AD]]
* [[376|376 AD]]
* [[436|436 AD]]
* [[496|496 AD]]
* [[556|556 AD]]
* [[616|616 AD]]
* [[676|676 AD]]
* [[736|736 AD]]
* [[796|796 AD]]
* [[856|856 AD]]
* [[916|916 AD]]
* [[976|976 AD]]
|
* [[1036|1036 AD]]
* [[1096|1096 AD]]
* [[1156|1156 AD]]
* [[1216|1216 AD]]
* [[1276|1276 AD]]
* [[1336|1336 AD]]
* [[1396|1396 AD]]
* [[1456|1456 AD]]
* [[1516|1516 AD]]
* [[1576|1576 AD]]
* [[1636|1636 AD]]
* [[1696|1696 AD]]
* [[1756|1756 AD]]
* [[1816|1816 AD]]
* [[1876|1876 AD]]
* [[1936|1936 AD]]
* [[1996|1996 AD]]
|
* [[2056 AD]]
* [[22nd century|2116 AD]]
* [[22nd century|2176 AD]]
* [[23rd century|2236 AD]]
* [[23rd century|2296 AD]]
* [[2356 AD]]
* [[2416 AD]]
* [[2476 AD]]
* [[2536 AD]]
* [[2596 AD]]
* [[2656 AD]]
* [[2716 AD]]
* [[2776 AD]]
* [[2836 AD]]
* [[2896 AD]]
* [[2956 AD]]
|}

==Months of Yang Fire Rat==
In a [[Common Era]] year whose final digit is 4 or 9 (corresponding to the heavenly stems [[Kinoe (甲)]] and [[Tsuchinoto (己)]]), the month of [[November]] is designated as the Besshi [[Month]]. However, the term "month" here may refer either to the month of the [[Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]] or to the seasonal month (from [[Daxue (solar term)|Daisetsu]] until the day before [[Xiaohan|Lesser Cold]]) as applicable.

==Days of Yang Fire Rat==
The [[Senjitsu]] for Besshi is as follows.
===Selected Day (選日)===
Besshi day is the 7th (final) day of the [[Tsuchi (Japanese term)|Hando]] period.

==See Also==
{{wikidata link|Q1062017}}
[[Category:Sexagenary cycle]]
[[Category:Sexagenary cycle members]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
